rationale: Ukraine reclaiming territory is a qualitative shift near Poland's border, while the France-Germany FCAS collapse continues to signal EU defense fragmentation relevant to Polish security.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukraine's counter-offensive progress is a qualitative shift in the war next door, potentially affecting Poland's security calculus and refugee flows. This is a new development above the routine conflict baseline.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: FCAS collapse continues to signal EU defense fragmentation; Poland, relying on NATO and US security guarantees, faces a weaker European defense architecture. Continuation of last cycle's entry.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate persists, keeping mild energy price uncertainty alive for Poland. No structural change; continued slow decay of relevance.
